title: Cost-effectiveness of fuzuloparib, with or without apatinib, for BRCA mutation HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer in China.
abstract: The FABULOUS trial showed that fuzuloparib, with or without apatinib, significantly improved progression-free survival (PFS) in patients with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative metastatic breast cancer with germline breast cancer susceptibility genes 1 or 2 mutations compared to standard chemotherapy. The study assessed the cost-effectiveness of three treatment options from the perspective of China's healthcare system.
trial_name: Olaparib Maintenance Therapy for BRCA-Mutated Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer
